lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਤੁਮ ਵਡ ਵਡੇ ਵਡੇ ਵਡ ਊਚੇ ਸੋ ਕਰਹਿ ਜਿ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੀਸ ॥
lines.translit: har tum vadd vadde vadde vadd aooche so kareh ji tudh bhaavees |
lines.english: O Lord, You are the Greatest of the Great, the Greatest of the Great, the most Lofty and High. You do whatever You please.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਆ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਸਾਬੀਸ ॥੨॥੨॥੮॥
lines.translit: jan naanak amrit peea guramatee dhan dhan dhan dhan dhan guroo saabees |2|2|8|
lines.english: Servant Nanak drinks in the Ambrosial Nectar through the Guru's Teachings. Blessed, blessed, blessed, blessed, blessed and praised is the Guru. ||2||2||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਰੂਪ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਵਡਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jis roop na rekh vaddaam |
lines.english: He has no form or feature - He is Great!

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮੋ ਮਨਿ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: bhaj raamo man raam |
lines.english: O mind, meditate and vibrate on the Lord, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲੁ ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat mil bhaj raam |
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, vibrate and meditate on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਡ ਹੋ ਹੋ ਭਾਗ ਮਥਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: badd ho ho bhaag mathaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is the high destiny written on your forehead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹੋਤੁ ਜਾਸੁ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਨਦੋ ਆਨੰਦੁ ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jit grihi mandar har hot jaas tith ghar aanado aanand bhaj raam raam raam |
lines.english: That household, that mansion, in which the Lord's Praises are sung - that home is filled with ecstasy and joy; so vibrate and meditate on the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਹਰੇ ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam gun gaavahu har preetam upades guroo gur satiguraa sukh hot har hare har hare hare bhaj raam raam raam |1|
lines.english: Sing the Glorious Praises of the Name of the Lord, the Beloved Lord. Through the Teachings of the Guru, the Guru, the True Guru, you shall find peace. So vibrate and meditate on the Lord, Har, Haray, the Lord, Raam |1|

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਸਿਸਟਿ ਧਾਰ ਹਰਿ ਤੁਮ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭੁ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਤੂ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sabh sisatt dhaar har tum kirapaal karataa sabh too too too raam raam raam |
lines.english: You are the Support of the whole universe, Lord; O Merciful Lord, You, You, You are the Creator of all, Raam, Raam, Raam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੋ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਦੇਹੁ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ਰਾਮ ॥੨॥੩॥੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanako saranaagatee dehu guramatee bhaj raam raam raam |2|3|9|
lines.english: Servant Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary; please bless him with the Guru's Teachings, that he may vibrate and meditate on the Lord, Raam, Raam, Raam. ||2||3||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਧਰ ਬਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: jit mil har paadhar baatt |
lines.english: Meeting Him, the Path to the Lord becomes smooth and easy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹੋ ਹੋ ਲਿਖੇ ਲਿਲਾਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ho ho likhe lilaatt |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord has written this destiny on my forehead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਰਸ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: bhaj har ras ras har gaatt |
lines.english: I lovingly vibrate and meditate on the Lord, and gulp down His Sublime Essence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਾਟਉ ਪਗ ਚਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: satigur chaattau pag chaatt |
lines.english: I eagerly kiss the Feet of the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਟ ਕਰਮ ਕਿਰਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਬਹੁ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਸਥਾਰ ਸਿਧ ਸਾਧਿਕ ਜੋਗੀਆ ਕਰਿ ਜਟ ਜਟਾ ਜਟ ਜਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: khatt karam kiriaa kar bahu bahu bisathaar sidh saadhik jogeea kar jatt jattaa jatt jaatt |
lines.english: Some perform the six rituals and rites; the Siddhas, seekers and Yogis put on all sorts of pompous shows, with their hair all tangled and matted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਭੇਖ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਜੋਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਤਸੰਗਤੀ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਖੋਲਿ ਖੋਲਿ ਕਪਾਟ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kar bhekh na paaeeai har braham jog har paaeeai satasangatee upades guroo gur sant janaa khol khol kapaatt |1|
lines.english: Yoga - Union with the Lord God - is not obtained by wearing religious robes; the Lord is found in the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, and the Guru's Teachings. The humble Saints throw the doors wide open. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਤਿ ਅਗਾਹੁ ਤੂ ਭਰਪੁਰਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਲ ਥਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਇਕੋ ਇਕ ਏਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਥਾਟ ॥
lines.translit: too aparanpar suaamee at agaahu too bharapur rahiaa jal thale har ik iko ik ekai har thaatt |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, You are the farthest of the far, utterly unfathomable. You are totally pervading the water and the land. You alone are the One and Only Unique Lord of all creation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਆਪੇ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਘਟਿ ਘਟੇ ਘਟਿ ਘਟੇ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਘਾਟ ॥੨॥੪॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: too jaaneh sabh bidh boojheh aape jan naanak ke prabh ghatt ghatte ghatt ghatte ghatt har ghaatt |2|4|10|
lines.english: You alone know all Your ways and means. You alone understand Yourself. Servant Nanak's Lord God is in each heart, in every heart, in the home of each and every heart. ||2||4||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਾਧੋ ॥
lines.translit: har har agam agaadho |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, is inaccessible and unfathomable.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਮਾਧੋ ॥
lines.translit: jap man gobid maadho |
lines.english: O mind, chant and meditate on the Lord, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਾਧੋ ॥
lines.translit: mat guramat har prabh laadho |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, my intellect attains the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਹੋ ਹੋ ਲਿਖੇ ਲਿਲਾਧੋ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhur ho ho likhe lilaadho |1| rahaau |
lines.english: This is the pre-ordained destiny written on my forehead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਚਿ ਬਹੁ ਚਿਤੈ ਬਿਕਾਰ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੁ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਤ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਧੋ ॥
lines.translit: bikh maaeaa sanch bahu chitai bikaar sukh paaeeai har bhaj sant sant sangatee mil satiguroo gur saadho |
lines.english: Collecting the poison of Maya, people think of all sorts of evil. But peace is found only by vibrating and meditating on the Lord; with the Saints, in the Sangat, the Society of the Saints, meet the True Guru, the Holy Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਛੁਹਿ ਪਾਰਸ ਮਨੂਰ ਭਏ ਕੰਚਨ ਤਿਉ ਪਤਿਤ ਜਨ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਸੁਧ ਹੋਵਤ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸੁਧ ਹਾਧੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jiau chhuhi paaras manoor bhe kanchan tiau patit jan mil sangatee sudh hovat guramatee sudh haadho |1|
lines.english: Just as when the iron slag is transmuted into gold by touching the Philosopher's Stone - when the sinner joins the Sangat, he becomes pure, through the Guru's Teachings. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਕਾਸਟ ਸੰਗਿ ਲੋਹਾ ਬਹੁ ਤਰਤਾ ਤਿਉ ਪਾਪੀ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰੇ ਸਾਧ ਸਾਧ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਸਾਧੋ ॥
lines.translit: jiau kaasatt sang lohaa bahu tarataa tiau paapee sang tare saadh saadh sangatee gur satiguroo gur saadho |
lines.english: Just like the heavy iron which is carried across on the wooden raft, sinners are carried across in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and the Guru, the True Guru, the Holy Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰਿ ਬਰਨ ਚਾਰਿ ਆਸ੍ਰਮ ਹੈ ਕੋਈ ਮਿਲੈ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਆਪਿ ਤਰੈ ਕੁਲ ਸਗਲ ਤਰਾਧੋ ॥੨॥੫॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: chaar baran chaar aasram hai koee milai guroo gur naanak so aap tarai kul sagal taraadho |2|5|11|
lines.english: There are four castes, four social classes, and four stages of life. Whoever meets the Guru, Guru Nanak, is himself carried across, and he carries all his ancestors and generations across as well. ||2||5||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਨੜਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: kaanarraa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Kaanraa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: har jas gaavahu bhagavaan |
lines.english: Sing the Praises of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸੁਨਿ ਜਸੁ ਕਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: mat guramat sun jas kaan |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Teachings, listen to His Praises with your ears.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹੋ ਹੋ ਕਿਰਪਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har ho ho kirapaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Lord shall be Merciful to you. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਤ ਪਾਪ ਲਹਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jas gaavat paap lahaan |
lines.english: Singing His Praises, sins are washed away.
